title: Install and configure plugins right from Settings
summary: The plugin browser now tells the truth and does the work: plugins only say Built-in when they're actually installed, every first-party integration (GitHub, Slack, Notion, Linear, Discord, Stripe, and more) gets a real Install button, and a new Configure form collects tokens and settings — stored on your device only.
highlights: Built-in badge now reflects what's actually installed — everything else shows Install
Install a first-party integration and drop straight into its setup form
Configure from the plugin details or the Installed tab; a Needs-setup hint flags unfinished connections
Tokens and webhook secrets stay on this device — they never sync
